Retire with confidence.
Not confusion.

A Portfolio Is Not a Plan.

You've spent decades building your savings. Now it's time to turn them into a retirement you can actually enjoy — with reliable income, lower taxes, and a plan that works even when markets don't.

GET YOUR FREE ASSESSMENT → FREE BOOK CHAPTER →

Mike Stevens and the Capital Wealth team have helped 1,000+ families retire with confidence since 2009. Fiduciary. Always.

Families Served 1,000+
Years of Experience 25+
Radio Show in Utah #1

THE RETIREMENT MONEY MAP™

Five Pillars. One Plan. Zero Guesswork.

Income That Lasts →

Turn your savings into reliable income streams that last your entire lifetime — not just the good years.

 Tax-Smart Withdrawals →

Strategic withdrawal planning that could save you thousands in unnecessary taxes every single year.

 Market Protection →

Protect your portfolio during downturns without sacrificing the growth you need to stay ahead of inflation.

 Healthcare Planning →

The blind spot most retirement plans miss. A clear framework for the costs that catch retirees off guard.

 Estate & Legacy →

Go beyond a basic will. Protect your family's future and leave the legacy you've earned.

 See How the Money Map Works →

Explore our proprietary framework for turning savings into a stress-free retirement.

Comprehensive Retirement Planning

A full-service approach to retirement income, tax efficiency, and long-term security.

Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing and Roth conversion strategies. → Portfolio Management Actively managed, diversified portfolios designed for retirement income and long-term growth. → Retirement Money Map A clear plan for every dollar — income, expenses, taxes, and healthcare, all coordinated. → 401(k) & IRA Rollovers Consolidate accounts and optimize your retirement savings strategy. → Social Security Optimization Time your benefits to maximize lifetime income for you and your spouse. → Medicare & IRMAA Planning Navigate healthcare costs and avoid surprise Medicare surcharges. → Estate & Legacy Planning Protect your family and pass wealth efficiently with coordinated estate strategies. → Federal Employee Benefits FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB — a complete framework for federal retirement. →

THE BOOK ON RETIREMENT

Retire Right, Retire Now

Coming Spring 2026

Mike Stevens wrote the book — literally. Retire Right, Retire Now shows you how to turn your savings into a clear, coordinated retirement strategy. No fluff. No jargon. Just the framework 1,000+ families have already used.

  • How to turn savings into reliable retirement income
  • Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies that save thousands
  • How to protect your portfolio during market volatility
  • A framework for healthcare cost planning
  • Estate and legacy planning beyond a basic will
GET YOUR FREE CHAPTER →

IN THE MEDIA

Retire Right Radio

Every week, Mike Stevens delivers straight talk on retirement planning — no jargon, no sales pitch. Just real guidance for real people navigating the biggest financial transition of their lives.

LISTEN ON APPLE PODCASTS →
AS SEEN & HEARD ON

FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

Retiring from Federal Service?
We Speak Your Language.

FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB, SCD, VERA, VSIP, MRA — we don't just know the acronyms, we build retirement plans around them. One of Utah's only firms specializing in federal employee benefits.

EXPLORE FEDERAL BENEFITS → SCHEDULE CONSULTATION →

Real Plans. Real Peace of Mind.

★★★★★

"My husband and I have had a great experience with Capital Wealth. The entire team we've worked with (Mike, Brent, Kaden and Teresa) have been very professional and have made us feel like they are genuinely concerned and committed to us reaching our goal of retiring successfully. They truly have gone above and beyond and have earned our trust."

"I finally have financial understanding and peace of mind."
★★★★★

"My wife and I, as well as my mother-in-law, have been working with the Capital Wealth team for over a year and have found Mike and his staff to be very welcoming and knowledgeable. They lay out the best advice and options for our financial well-being, and they make sure we understand the full picture before making decisions."

Julie E. Google Review
"Capital Wealth is a great company to work with."
★★★★★

"We've been extremely pleased with our experience at Capital Wealth. The team is professional, responsive, and truly invested in helping us achieve our financial goals. They take the time to explain everything clearly and make us feel confident about our retirement plan."

Cory M. Google Review
"Mike was the only one who addressed taxes."
★★★★★

"Mike and his staff are the best! We previously were with two other financial planners whose fees were too high and their investment ability had no comparison to Mike. He was also the only one who addressed taxes. Mike got our retirement finances completely organized and set up for the long haul."

Collette D. Google Review
"I found an advisor who genuinely cares."
★★★★★

"I was nervous to find a financial advisor because I feel like all the ones we've used just cared about how they could make money off us. After reading reviews of Capital Wealth, I gave them a try. Mike has been above and beyond helpful year after year. I highly recommend them!"

Christina L. Google Review
★★★★★

"Mike and his team at Capital Wealth are fantastic. They really take the time to understand your situation and build a plan that makes sense. I feel confident about my retirement for the first time."

Ordinaryguy40 Google Review
★★★★★

"Professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring. Mike Stevens and his team have been excellent stewards of our retirement funds. They explain everything clearly and are always available when we have questions."

John S. Fuller Google Review
★★★★★

"We have been working with Capital Wealth for several years now and couldn't be happier. They've helped us navigate some complex financial decisions and we feel much more secure about our retirement."

This Is For You If...

SCHEDULE CONSULTATION →
/1
You've saved diligently but aren't sure if it's enough
We help families with $500K+ turn uncertainty into a clear plan.
/2
You're within 10 years of retirement (or already retired)
The transition from saving to spending is the hardest part. We specialize in it.
/3
You have a portfolio but not a coordinated plan
A collection of accounts isn't a strategy. We connect the pieces.
/4
You're worried about taxes eating into your retirement income
Tax planning alone can save tens of thousands over a retirement.
/5
You want clarity, not complexity
Our Retirement Money Map gives you a visual, year-by-year roadmap.
/6
You're a federal employee navigating FERS, TSP, or separation benefits
We're one of the few firms that specialize in federal retirement.
